arts.ttl: Giovanni Reyna almost ended up at RB Leipzig

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Host Lille
arts.sum: Despite the meager reading, Lille have found a way to win important games all season and capped off their last UCL match with a dominant 6-1 display over Feyenoord. Arguably the most important game of Niko Kovac’s tenure takes place tomorrow and we will see how far Borussia Dortmund have come.
